notes: Forkable baseline for U-26. Import via Settings → Office config. Does not include patient PHI.

accInbox.notes: Leave inboxPath empty for default %USERPROFILE%\ACC-Inbox. Set a writable path if IT blocks profile folders (e.g. H:\ACC-Inbox). Also overridable via env ACC_INBOX_PATH or ACC_INBOX.

emailSync.notes: captureMode decides what a sender-matched email must ALSO have to be captured/saved: 'attachment' (DEFAULT) = allowlisted ACC sender + at least one supported attachment (.pdf/.docx/.doc); the subject is NO LONGER required, it is only logged as a confidence hint (so name-only letters like 'Steyn'/'Watson' are captured). 'sender+subject+attachment' = legacy strict (also requires a subject-token match). 'subject-or-attachment' = sender + (subject match OR supported attachment). Body-only emails (no attachment) are not captured. Overridable via env ACC_EMAIL_SYNC_CAPTURE_MODE. subjectMatchMode (the hint only): 'tokens' (default) = subject contains EITHER Claim OR ACCID (colon-optional, case-insensitive so 'Claim 123', 'Claim:123', 'ACCID' all match); 'all' = BOTH Claim AND ACCID; 'any' = match any of accInbox.subjectPatterns. Overridable via env ACC_EMAIL_SYNC_SUBJECT_MODE. attachmentExtensions is case-insensitive (.PDF/.Pdf/.pdf all accepted); .doc is saved for review but the app importer needs .docx (Save As in Word first). Everything saved still lands in the Human Review Queue for MANUAL sign-off - nothing auto-commits, so over-capturing is safe.

accWorkHours.notes: Work-hours window for a FUTURE scheduled/automated sync daemon only (runs with -Scheduled). enabled=false (default) means MANUAL runs — double-clicking Start Email Sync.cmd or Start WFH Mode.cmd — ALWAYS proceed regardless of time of day, because a manual launch is itself the signal you are working. Set enabled=true only if you later add a scheduled daemon and want it to skip outside start-end (whole hours, 24h NZ local time; start inclusive, end exclusive). start/end here take precedence over emailSync.workStartHour/workEndHour. Also overridable via env ACC_EMAIL_SYNC_WORK_START / ACC_EMAIL_SYNC_WORK_END / ACC_EMAIL_SYNC_WORK_HOURS_ENABLED. Manual runs never consult this block.
